goal: Reverse-prompt the entire repo into a complete, rebuildable specification: full documentation of every feature plus a complete wireframe, written under docs/fractions_tutorial-rebuild-spec/. Coverage must be 100% of routes/endpoints/models with no duplication, proven by the _coverage/ audit.

completion.prNote: gh CLI not installed — branch pushed; user opens the PR via the link

engine-core.note: 1 checklist item still [ ] — re-check at audit

firstWorker.outcome: STALLED at 600s (context bloat) after assembling 7 of 12 canonical docs

remainderWorker.note: v1 a4b16ec stopped (branched off wrong base, no merge instr); v2 merges work/rp-260608-2215-spec first. leftovers has no tasks.md fragment (8-slice assembly).

fragmentGathering: At synthesis: each done slice's fragments live in its worktree at <worktree>/docs/fractions_tutorial-rebuild-spec/_coverage/fragments/<slice>/ (untracked there). Gather all into the spec branch, assemble into canonical section files, then audit vs census.
fragmentsRule: Each slice worker writes ONLY under docs/fractions_tutorial-rebuild-spec/_coverage/fragments/<slice-id>/ — its per-section fragment files (design.md, data-model.md, requirements.md, api-contracts.md, env-and-config.md, ui-wireframes.md, gotchas.md, tasks.md, adrs/*.md) AND its own checklist.md. Disjoint paths => no cross-worktree merge conflicts. The SYNTHESIS step assembles fragments into the canonical top-level section files and writes the synthesis-owned cross-cutting docs. The AUDIT runs after synthesis.
supervision: Runs AS catalog agent docs-supervisor (opus): idempotent one-cycle-per-tick; reconstruct state from marker+git+TaskList+_coverage; verify-don't-trust (ac-verify-claims + verification-before-completion) — a slice is done only when its fragments/<slice>/checklist.md is fully [x] and the fragment sections exist; gate = spec-coverage-map Phase D + spec-rebuild-test (NOT code QA/deploy); land = one reviewable PR, not a merge to main.
notes: DAG: census(done) -> [9 slices, cap 6 parallel] -> synthesis(assemble fragments + cross-cutting) -> audit -> PR. All 9 slices depend only on census. Foundational slices spawned first.

tickets.title: React runtime hooks + advisory affect layer
